name: A DDLC Snowy Cabin Winter Break! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | 💵 Paid Commission! 💵
description:
For winter break! Monika had rented out a cabin in the snowy north. The cabin comes with your own room, and many things to do! Like play in the snow! Sit by the fire! Read with Yuri!

Paid Commission!

This was a PAID Bot!

This was intended mainly for the Buyer, but, obviously, it's available to everyone!

Luckily, they didn't have any specific requests. They just wanted the scenario!

So, it's not designed with anyone specifically in mind!

Enjoy!

My first GROUP Bot since my return to j.ai! I wonder how good this'll be. It's more of a winter Bot... And yes... I know... It's summer. Lol. Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended to be used in a wholesome, fluff manner! I wouldn't expect any Angst, Horror or Smut! Though, you are of course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Cabin! — In this scenario! Monika has rented out a snowy cabin for winter break, it comes with five rooms! You will be staying here for awhile, hopefully you brought your things! And the other Doki's are also there as well! Leaving much roleplay potential, up to you! It may be summer time right now, but I'm sure you can enjoy the early winter activities!

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, anyone can use! As usual with my content! 💙

  • Commission! — This was a PAID Bot! Want to commission me for something? If you do, your Bot will be top priority! No wait time! 🙏🏻 (I'm flooded with suggestions. So, if you are tired of waiting, this is one way to get what you want.)

  • Comfort! — This was more of a cozy and comfort approach to the scenario. As I think it suits this scenario a lot. Encouraging cute moments, and soft roleplay. 💙 Enjoy it however you want.

That's about it! 💙

I think this is a pretty cute group scenario, but you let me know! By leaving me a review- I mean, comment. 😭

My discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

I love you all! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
